rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE RALPH R. OROQUITA REVOCABLE TRUST TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion To Amend The Petition Re: Expungement Of Lis Pendens
rulings.Rulings: This tentative ruling is issued by Judge Ross C. Moody On May 2, 2022, Petitioner Ralph Richrd Oroquita, Jr. filed a "Motion to Amend the Petition Re: Expungement of Lis Pendens." The only relief sought in the motion was "for an order permitting the filing of an amendment to the petition in this matter." Thereafter, on May 23, 2023, Petitioner filed an "Amended Petition to Determine Validity of Trust Amendment and Damages and Attorney Fees [Probate Code section 17200, et seq.]." Because an amended petition has been filed, and the sole relief sought in the motion was leave to file an amended petition, the motion to amend is hereby denied as moot. Petitioner shall lodge with the clerk in Department 204 by the time set for this hearing a proposed order consistent with this tentative ruling as published above. Any party wishing to contest this tentative ruling by appearing at the scheduled hearing must so advise other parties and the courtroom clerk (415-551-3702) no later than 4:00 p.m. on the day before the hearing. Remote appearance is available in conformity with the current General Order of the Probate and Mental Health Division, available on the court's website at https://sfsuperiorcourt.org/divisions/probate. To appear by Zoom, go to zoom.us and click "Join Meeting." Enter Meeting ID number 87580177925 and passcode 722809. To appear telephonically through Zoom, call 1-669-900-6833 and follow the prompts. Enter Meeting ID number 87580177925 and passcode 722809. Parties appearing via Zoom should use their full names in the "Your Name" section. Counsel and parties may appear by audio-only telephone through CourtCall by calling CourtCall at 1-888-882-6878 and obtaining an appearance access code for the hearing's scheduled date and time in Department 204.
